text_block_list.text: Thanks to her art going viral online, Marche Lorraine had been invited to present a new work at an exhibition——

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
(Ngh… What do I do? 
Oh no… 
Am I getting art block…?)

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text: (…Usually ideas for pieces just come up naturally, but now…)

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
(…Nothing's coming to me… 
Even though I WANT to make something, I can't think of what…)

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
(…W-What do I do? 
Maybe it'll just go away by itself?)

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
(B-But what if it doesn't? 
…Oh, no…)

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
(…Maybe I should talk to Love-chan… 
No. I can't.)

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
(She trusted me to handle this… 
I can't betray her trust…)

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
(Oh… Maybe… 
Maybe if I read the comments, it'll help cure my art block!)

"You're really going to be at an exhibition?" 
"you do stuff IRL!?" 
"CAN'T WAIT!!"

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
(…Ngh… 
They've got high hopes for me too… 
It's so much attention…)

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
I- I need to think of something… 
Something that'll make everyone happy…!

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: …Maru-chan…
choice_data_list: Are you not going to talk to her?
Are you not going to talk to her?

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text:
No, not yet. 
I mean, look how hard she's trying.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: If I said something now, I'd just make her feel worse.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: So I'm going to get her creative juices flowing a different way… My way!

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text: ……Ah.

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
"Yo! G'morning! 
How are you doing? 
Because Maru-chan's doing great!"
…So says the puppet, but her face told a different story.
I figured that, as long as it was a third party like me asking, and not Loves Only You, then it wouldn't affect her too badly.

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
…… 
"To be honest, not yet!"

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text: "Expectations are so high that I'm overthinking it, and it's actually making it harder to come up with something… You know how it is!"

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text: "I'm really worried about letting them down, and I guess it's giving me art block. Ha ha. Ha."
It sounded to me like she wasn't telling the whole truth. Like she was trying to hide her anxiety.
choice_data_list: Don't worry about quality, just create.
How'd you feel making the last piece?
Maybe try a change of scenery?

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
……… 
"But I have to worry about quality! It's for an exhibition, remember?"
I told her, exhibition or not, getting her hands moving to work on something would be more productive than doing nothing but worry.

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
"…Oh. 
Yeah, you might be right!"

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
"Anything's better than an empty canvas! 
I like the way you think!"

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
"Thanks! 
I'm going to get right to it～!"

Marche Lorraine bowed her head a bit behind her puppet. 
I hoped things would go well for her.

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
(…… 
…That piece was…)

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
…… 
"I had fun painting it, duh! 
I can hardly forget how fun it was."

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
"Hmm… Maybe taking another look at it will blow my art block away. 
I'm going to give it a shot!"

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
"Thanks for the talk! 
See ya☆"

Marche Lorraine bowed her head a bit behind her puppet. 
I hoped things would go well for her.

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
"Change of scenery? 
Oh… Yeah! 
That might be a good idea."

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
"A change of scenery might help with my art block… 
It's worth a shot ☆"

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
"Thanks for the advice! 
I'm going to try it right away. See ya!"

Marche Lorraine bowed her head a bit behind her puppet. 
I hoped things would go well for her.
